sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65023" key="*marew=tis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Μᾰρεῶτις</orth> (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">λίμνη</etym>), ibid.:—also <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen> </entryFree>
